verification-kyb.title: Verify your organization
verification-kyb.subtitle: Unlock full access to all features
verification-kyb.verify-subtitle: Verify now to access all features immediately
verification-kyb.what-next-step2: An email and notification will be sent to you
verification-kyb.what-next-step3: Start posting jobs and issuing credentials
verification-kyb.success-subtitle: Our verification team will take 1-3 days to process your verification request. An email and notification will be sent to you upon successful verification and you will then be able to issue credentials.
verification-kyb.banner-success-subtitle: Congratulations! Your organization has been successfully verified.
verification-kyb.banner-pending-subtitle: We reviewing your submitted documents, we will notify you once it is complete.

verification-kyc.title: Identity verification
verification-kyc.subtitle: Verify your account to prevent impersonation and unlock features like claiming your impact, verifying experience, and voting for impact projects.
verification-kyc.why-verify-subtitle: This step is essential for maintaining the integrity and security of our platform, preventing fraudulent activities.
verification-kyc.how-verify-step1: Go through the app’s onboarding process which will create a decentralized ID on Atala Prism.
verification-kyc.how-verify-step2: Verify your identity with Veriff, our KYC partner.
verification-kyc.banner-success-subtitle: Congratulations! Your account is now verified.
verification-kyc.banner-error-subtitle: An error occurred during the verification process.
